attributes.action: Mandate religious leaders to declare all violent teachings no longer applicable
attributes.additional_details: This petition would require religious leaders and institutions to publicly clarify that violent religious teachings were specific to historical circumstances and must not be followed or used to justify violence, hatred or discrimination in modern Britain. Public bodies and civic leaders should reinforce these principles to support social cohesion, public safety and shared democratic values.
attributes.background: Mandate religious leaders to publicly declare that violent religious teachings and scriptures are historical, symbolic or no longer applicable today, and must not be used to justify violence, hatred or discrimination against others.

rejection.details:
We can only accept petitions about things the Government or Parliament are directly responsible for.

The interpretation of religious doctrine is not the responsibility of the UK Government or Parliament.
